MoaiTip: §6Here's a special tip!: Try right-clicking a plush box with cobblestone!

RatatinLine6: §0Shadow Rat§7: Thank you stranger!, I don't know who you are, but §atake this in return for your generosity!
StickTip: §9Here's a tip!: Try right-clicking a plushie with a stick!
